entity.summary: Decentralized exchange protocol within Fluid, providing smart-liquidity trading infrastructure, DEX V2 routing, DEX Lite integration, and chain-specific liquidity deployments.
entity.notes: HEI models Fluid chain rows, Fluid DEX, and Fluid DEX Lite as one exchange entity. Current first-party technical documentation includes DEX V2 and DEX Lite liquidity-source integration, DEX fee/configuration components, resolvers, swap routing, and current protocol contracts.

evidence.title: Fluid Technical Docs contracts overview
evidence.notes: First-party technical documentation exposes current Fluid DEX V2, Fluid DEX, and Fluid DEX Lite integration guides together with deployed DEX contracts and resolvers.

evidence.title: Fluid DEX V2 liquidity source integration
evidence.notes: Current first-party DEX V2 integration documentation describes active swap routing and liquidity-source integration for Fluid DEX V2.

evidence.title: Fluid DEX Lite liquidity source integration
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation covers Fluid DEX Lite integration. HEI keeps DEX Lite and chain-specific source rows under the single Fluid DEX entity.
